title: Better Visible Ores
description: Another Recourse Pack for visible ores, that fixes some visual glitches from other Recourse Packs.
body:
# What does this add?
This RP adds Glowing Ores, and fixes a visual glitch other RP have, trough adding the "Emissivness" trough LabPBR instead of the ```emissive.properties``` file.

# How to run?
You need to use a **Shader with labPBR** support to run this, and turn on labPBR. (I recommend [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) or [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)). **If you want the connecting textures to work, [DOWNLOAD CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)!**


### BSL:
Options... -> Video Settings... -> Shader Packs... -> BSL -> Material -> **Material Format -- labPBR & Advanced Material -- ON**

### Complementary:
Options... -> Video Settings... -> Shader Packs... -> ComplementaryReimagined -> **RP Support -- labPBR (RP Required)**



<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

### Can I use this in my modpack?
> Yes, but leave credit and a link to this project.

</details>

### Made by [**Not Awake Studios**](https://modrinth.com/organization/NotAwakeStudios).
